item.title: A Small Forge Project in Plain Stock
item.description: A small forge project that turns plain stock into gear you’ll actually want to keep.

media:content.media:description: A small forge project that turns plain stock into gear you’ll actually want to keep.

item.title: Restoring Old Chisels with Simple Steel Work
item.description: A simple restore that shows old steel can still have plenty left in it through careful tool restoration and blacksmithing.

media:content.media:title: Restoring Old Chisels with Simple Steel Work
media:content.media:description: A simple restore that shows old steel can still have plenty left in it through careful tool restoration and blacksmithing.

item.title: Quieting an Old Anvil
item.description: A few proven fixes can make old iron a lot easier to live with.

item.description: A simple method that leaves a cleaner result and a better shop feel.

item.title: Learn to Bank Your Forge Fire
item.description: A calm, practical look at banking a forge fire to keep heat steady for blacksmithing and metalwork.

media:content.media:description: A calm, practical look at banking a forge fire to keep heat steady for blacksmithing and metalwork.

item.title: A Small Rethink in Metalworking
item.description: A small rethink can turn junk metal into something worth keeping. A calm look at blacksmithing, tool restoration, and metalworking.

media:content.media:description: A small rethink can turn junk metal into something worth keeping. A calm look at blacksmithing, tool restoration, and metalworking.
